title: clematis orientalis var. intricata
intro: Clematis orientalis var. intricata, also known as the Oriental clematis, is a type of flowering vine native to Asia and Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Clematis orientalis var. intricata include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
